titleStmt.title: SII 18.138: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 138. (B.K. No. 187 of 1932-33.) GADAG, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the northern prākāra of the Vīranārāyaṇasvāmin temple.

summary.p: This damaged inscription which refers itself to the reign of Bhūlōkamalladēva is dated in the 11th year of his reign Naḷa, Jyēshṭha s11u. Bidige, Monday, Saṁkrānti. The details correspond to A.D. 1136 May 4, Monday f.d.t. ·12. There was however no saṁkramaṇa on that day.

It records a grant of land and money by Chauḍeyadēva for the worship and offerings to the god Hṛishikēs11a of Kāḷimayyagēri. It records another grant of land to the god Kēśavadēva of the same place, by Māhaṇṇa and his wife Māḷiyakka. A certain Madhuvaṇṇa also made a grant of money to the same god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ para
mabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmaccāḷukyasarvvajña
cakravartti bhūlōkamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamā na
mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire © svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāra
ṇamōnānuṣṭhānaparāyaṇarvviditavēdārtthavidyāpāragarṣaṭkarmmaniratarssapta
sōmasaṁsthāvabhṛthāvagāhanapavitrīkṛtaśarīrarccaturvvēdapāragaraṣṭādaśadharmma śāstra
kuśalarēkavākyaracaḷitadhairyyardhairyyaparākramarāśritajanakalpavṛkṣa
rahitapakṣakṣayakararkkaliyugagāṁgēyarpparamaparōpakārigaḷāhavadhuraṁdha
rarśśāpānugrahasamarttharkkāryya bṛhaspatigaḷēkaikapaṁḍitarggrāmanāmōttama
rvvaiṣṇavagītimanōhararppāpabhīrugaḷu paranārīdūrardduṣṭavidhvaṁsakarvviśi ṣṭajanāśraya
rdvātriṁśatsahasrasamayārgghyārhardvijakuḷatiḷa
karśśaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjararssamastaguṇaviśēṣōṁnnatarappa śrīrāmaradattimahāgra
hāraṁ śrī mallokkiguṇḍiyūroḍeyapramukha mahājanaṁ śrīsāsirvvaruṁ samastagōle
gōbrāhmāṇarmmodalāge sabālavṛddharnneredu dharmmaṁgaḷaṁ svadharmmadiṁ surakṣitamūgi
rakṣisuttamiṟdu bandhujanasarōjākaramūrtta
mayyana tanadi . Ene negaḻda vipramukhya
moḷarundhatiyenisidaḷanavadyasuhṛ
bhavanādaṁ viprānvayāmṛtārnnavacaṁdraṁ
naṁbhōruha cavuṇḍayadēva © svasti śrīmadu bhūlōka
malladēvavarṣada 11neya naḷasaṁvatsarada jēṣṭa śuddha bidige sōmavāra saṁkrānti vyatī
pātadaṁdu kāḷimayagēriya hṛṣīkēsadēvaraṁgabhōgakkeṁdu cauḍeya dēvaru kā
ḷimayagēriya satadalu yanāgaṇnaṁ tanna satada kisu
dalu dēvara tōṁṭakkendu biṭṭakeyi yeremattaru © mattaṁ haṟuheya ra
kkaṁ dēvara nandādīvigegeṁdu biṭṭa gadyāṇa 1 dēvara bhaṁḍāra gadyāṇa 10 ©
[Ī] dharmmamaṁ śrīsāsirvvaruṁ kēriya nūrvvaruṁ svadharmmadiṁ surakṣitamāge rakṣisuvaru
ḍalakaṁdara kalidēvanāyakara kāḷimayyagēriya kēśavadēvaraṁgabhōga
riyokkala māhaṇnaṁ kapilevaḷḷadiṁ baḍagaṇa bhaṭṭasōjiyara mū
hasugeya naḍuvaṇabhāgamaṁ kālgaccugoṁḍu biṭṭa bāvi mūṟu sū
. Āyana brāhmaṇi māḷiyakkaṁ tanna mēreya bāgina maddeyara
jīyara baḷadavaidu mattarkeyya The rest of the line is erased.
varaṁgabhōgakke biṭṭaḷ . dēvara bārika sōvimayyana maga madhuvaṇna kāḷi magēri
kēśavadēvara pavitrakke biṭṭa gadyāṇa 1 Ā honnavarṣakke yeraḍu haṇavaḍḍiyalu kā
ḷimagēriya nūrvvaru dhoreyenisikoṭṭu Ī dharmmamaṁ tamma dharmmameṁdu prati
pāḷisuvaru . hiriyokkala māhaṇnana madavaḷige māḷiyakkaṁ hātana
ya baḍagaṇadeseya tamma 12 mattaru kāḷpattiya keyyaṁ kāḷima gēriya
va dēvaraṁgabhōgakke tanniṁ parōkṣadalu biṭṭaḷu Ā bhūmiya kēriya nūrvvaru tamma
dharmmameṁdu pratipāḷisuvaru .
Digital edition of SII 18.138 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
